resultList.dtldesc: Redefining the concept of luxury and harmony, this magnificent 4BHK villa nestled in Kapra, Hyderabad is worth investing your hard earned money. Revel in the splendour of modern comforts in one of Hyderabads poshest neighbourhoods. This premium abode is undoubtedly worth buying for families with an exquisite taste for luxury living.USP - Complete furniture is availableProperty SpecificationsFacing the auspicious east direction, this abode is beautifully crafted by following all the Vaastu guidelines for the well being and happiness of the residents. With a carpet area of 1800 sqft, this abode is spread across ground plus two floors. The ground floor is well presented with 1 guest room, living room, kitchen, dining room, servants room and 2 bathrooms 1 Indian and 1 western. Among the two bathrooms, one is attached to the bedroom and one is available for common use. Coming to the first floor, it consists of a living room, 2 attached western style bathrooms and 1 balcony. The balcony linked with the living room is perfect for enjoying your cup of teacoffee along with the views of the road and surrounding.The major highlight of this property is the second floor as it comprises a home theater and a mini theater with both audio and video system. Furthermore, there are also 2 balconies on either side of this floor overlooking the road.To bestow a joyful cooking experience to the homemaker, the kitchen is well organised with a cooking countertop, sink, cabinets and chimney. In addition, there is also a utility attached to it, which is an added advantage. The marble and vitrified flooring further creates a magnificent impact on the interiors. The outside area is decked up with granite flooring.FacilitiesThe villa is completely safe and secured as 8 CCTV cameras have been installed while there are security guards available for the entire society. Also, fencing is done for the society for more safety. Other facilities like covered parking space, 24x7 water supply and power backup are available. LocalitySeveral prestigious educational institutions, medical health care centers, shopping outlets, banks and ATM centers are all available within the vicinity. Kapra has exceptional connectivity to various parts of the city via a strong network of public transport. Also, the railway station is located at a distance of 8km from this property.

resultList.dtldesc: Nestled in the vibrant locality of Hyder Nagar in Hyderabad, this exquisite 3 BHK flat offers a luxurious and comfortable living experience. Located on the 4th floor of a well-maintained building with a total of 4 floors, this fully furnished gem boasts a carpet area of 1350 sqft, offering ample space for your familys needs.Property SpecificationsThe apartment presents a thoughtful and functional layout with attention to detail. The living space is adorned with vitrified flooring, creating an elegant and easy-to-maintain environment. The flat is fully furnished, providing a seamless move-in experience.The property is thoughtfully designed to be vaastu compliant, ensuring positive energy flow and harmony. With a west-facing orientation, the flat receives ample natural light and ventilation, creating a cheerful and inviting ambiance.With 3 bedrooms, this home ensures privacy and comfort for each family member. Among these, 2 bedrooms feature attached western-style bathrooms equipped with geysers for your convenience. Additionally, theres a common western-style bathroom to cater to guests. This flat boasts not one, but three balconies, each offering its own unique perspective. One is attached to the master bedroom, one is connected to the hall and the third balcony, a utility balcony, is attached to the kitchen. All three balconies offer scenic views of the bustling road and the nearby metro station.The kitchen offers a practical space with a platform and sink, while the utility balcony adjacent to the kitchen serves as a handy space for chores. The apartments living and dining areas are thoughtfully designed, providing distinct spaces for relaxation and entertainment. The flat also features a separate puja room, perfect for moments of tranquility and spirituality.FacilitiesThe property is equipped with covered parking, ensuring the safety and security of your vehicle. It features 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, ensuring an uninterrupted water flow. The convenience of 100 power backup and round-the-clock security services, including CCTV surveillance, adds an extra layer of safety and comfort to your life. Lifts are available, making daily commuting within the building hassle-free.LocalitySituated in a prime location, this property is surrounded by numerous amenities. Its conveniently located near Rainbow Hospital and is easily accessible from the highway. The neighborhood offers a plethora of educational institutions, with 7 to 8 schools within a 1 km radius. The Ratnadeep Supermarket, just 200 meters away, caters to your daily shopping needs.Banks and ATMs are also within close proximity. Public transport options abound, with a metro station a mere 300 to 400 meters away, and the nearest railway station lying within 3 to 5 km. This ensures smooth connectivity within the city and beyond.
